columns.name: away_goals
columns.description: The number of goals scored by the away team.

columns.name: away_team
columns.description: The name of the team playing away from their home stadium.

columns.name: date
columns.description: The date when the match took place, formatted as DD/MM/YY.

columns.name: home_goals
columns.description: The number of goals scored by the home team.

columns.name: home_team
columns.description: The name of the team playing at their home stadium.

columns.name: player_of_the_match
columns.description: The name of the player deemed the most outstanding in the match.

columns.name: player_of_the_match_team
columns.description: The team of the player of the match.
